title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mapei India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mapei India
jsonLd.description:
We at Mapei India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mapei India:
Mapei India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India!
